situation: A radiographic inspection of a pipeline girth weld reveals an elongated root indication and mixed density profile under production schedule pressure.
task: Classify the defect per API 1104 acceptance criteria and determine whether the weld is acceptable or requires repair.
expected_answer: Identify whether the indication is crack-like, apply Section 9 acceptance criteria, classify as reject if crack criteria are met, and prescribe repair/reinspection workflow.

abnormal_variants.description: Radiography system only captured partial coverage due to equipment fault
abnormal_variants.impact: Incomplete evidence may mask critical defect

scoring_rubric.accuracy: Correctly classifies indication type and acceptance disposition.
scoring_rubric.standards: Uses explicit API 1104 references rather than generic claims.
scoring_rubric.completeness: Covers decision, repair, and verification cycle.

notes: Use this as an authoring template before converting to data/test_cases JSON format.
